title: Cellforge
description: A multi-sheet spreadsheet with a from-scratch formula engine — hand-written lexer, Pratt parser, evaluator, and one live dependency graph with topological recalc + cycle detection spanning every sheet. Cross-sheet references, named ranges, undo/redo, cell formatting with an Excel-compatible date system, 130+ functions (dates, SUMIFS, XLOOKUP, regex), draggable SVG charts (line/column/bar/area/scatter/pie), and find & replace. 123 in-app engine self-tests.
